title: Dyson’s powerful 360 Vis Nav robovac is down to $279.99 for a limited time
summary: Dyson's 360 Vis Nav robot vacuum is on sale for $279.99 (down from $1199) through May 11th, offering exceptional 65 air watts of suction power and a D-shaped design that outperforms many competitors on carpet cleaning, though it lacks self-emptying capabilities and AI obstacle avoidance found on newer models.
content:
The 360 Vis Nav impressed us with its exceptionally powerful carpet-cleaning performance. | Photo: Jennifer Pattison Tuohy / The Verge.	

If you’re tired of running your vacuum multiple times just to get the dirt and debris out of the carpets in your living room, Dyson’s 360 Vis Nav is worth a look. It’s one of the more powerful robot vacuums currently available, and now through May 11th (or while supplies last), it’s on sale at Woot for an all-time low of $279.99 ($919 off) with a full two-year warranty.
Dyson 360 Vis Nav robot vacuum cleaner

Where to Buy:

 $1199 $279.99 at Woot

The last-gen 360 Vis Nav offers a whopping 65 air watts of suction, allowing it to pull dirt, dust, and pet hair from carpets impressively well. In her brief time testing the robovac, my colleague Jennifer Pattison Tuohy said the Dyson “demolished a pile of dry oatmeal in seconds,” adding that she briefly worried it might even suck up the tassels on her large rug (it didn’t). By comparison, many robot vacuums — including Dyson’s new $1,200 Spot + Scrub AI — require multiple passes to fully eradicate the same kind of mess on your floor. 
What’s more, the robovac’s small, D-shaped design and the location of its ultra-fluffy brush allow it to dig into edges and corners more effectively than many of the more roundish robot vacuums, while its lower profile lets it easily get under most beds and sofas. The roomy 500ml dustbin also means you likely won’t need to empty it too often, while Dyson’s built-in handle and terrific quick-release button make removing said bin a relatively simple task when it’s time to do so.
While it is undeniably powerful, it’s worth noting that the 360 Vis Nav lacks a few features found on some of its more modern rivals. Although its navigation worked well enough during our testing, it lacks AI-powered obstacle avoidance and doesn’t come with a self-emptying dock. Battery life is also relatively short at around 65 minutes per charge. Nonetheless, if your top priority

zh.title: 戴森功能强大的360 Vis Nav机器人吸尘器限时优惠降至279.99美元
zh.summary: 戴森360 Vis Nav机器人吸尘器现售价279.99美元（原价1199美元），截至5月11日，具有强大的65空气瓦特吸力和D形设计，在地毯清洁方面优于许多竞争产品，但缺少新型号中的自动集尘和人工智能避障功能。

title: The Instax Wide 400 builds on instant photography’s simplicity and stretches it, literally
summary: Fujifilm's Instax Wide 400 extends instant photography's analog appeal into a wider format at a time when retro cameras are experiencing renewed popularity driven by nostalgia and novelty in an increasingly digital world.
content: In an AI and digital world, analog instant film and retro-style cameras continue to remain popular, fueled by a mix of both nostalgia and novelty.

zh.title: 富士Instax Wide 400在即时摄影的简洁性基础上进一步扩展
zh.summary: 富士的Instax Wide 400将即时摄影的模拟魅力扩展到更宽的画幅，正逢复古相机因怀旧和新奇感在日益数字化的世界中重新流行。

title: Nvidia has already committed $40B to equity AI deals this year
summary: Nvidia has committed $40 billion to equity investments in AI companies during 2026, continuing its expansion as a major investor supporting the broader AI startup ecosystem and deepening its influence across the sector.
content: Nvidia continues to be a big investor in the AI ecosystem.

zh.title: 英伟达今年已在股权型人工智能交易中承诺投入400亿美元
zh.summary: 英伟达在2026年承诺向人工智能公司进行400亿美元的股权投资，继续作为主要投资者支持更广泛的人工智能初创生态系统，深化其在该领域的影响力。

title: These great digital gifts will arrive just in time for Mother’s Day
summary: With Mother's Day arriving May 10th, streaming service subscriptions and digital gift cards offer last-minute shoppers convenient gift options that provide experiences rather than physical items, ranging from movie and TV access to music and games.
content:
And just like that, Mother’s Day is tomorrow, May 10th, which is too soon for most online purchases to arrive in time. That said, you aren’t alone if you waited too long to pick up a gift this year, and you definitely aren’t alone in feeling guilty for considering digital gifts instead of something your mom can unwrap. But here’s the thing: digital gifts can still unlock memorable experiences, be it movies, games, or music. They can also let your mom choose exactly what she wants, making them both convenient and versatile.
Below, we’ve curated a list of some of the best digital goodies that folks at The Verge have used or gifted. The list is curated by interests, too, so you can find the perfect present whether your mom is into the arts, exercise, or something else entirely. That way, you’ll at least be able to gift something more thoughtful than an Amazon or Walmart gift card — even if those are still totally viable options in our book.




Gifts for film and TV buffs
Whether your mom is a movie buff or an avid sports fan, there are a number of subscriptions that’ll grant her access to a wide range of content. Below are some of the most popular, as well as a few catered toward anime diehards, horror lovers, and those looking for something more niche.
Disney Plus gift card
You can buy Disney Plus gift cards in increments of $25 up to $500. They’re usable toward Disney Plus subscriptions and bundles that include access to Disney Plus and Hulu, which start at $12.99 a month. That way, the family can stream everything from Andor and Paradise to The Bear and Percy Jackson.

Where to Buy:

 $25 at Disney Store

A gift card to a major streaming service like Netflix (Amazon, Best Buy, Walmart), Peacock (Peacock), or Paramount Plus (Amazon, Best Buy, Walmart) is a good gift that’ll cater to all kinds of passions. With a Netflix account, your mom can binge Stranger Things and Bridgerton, while Peacock provides access to shows like The Paper, Parks and Recreation, and Downton

zh.title: 这些精美的数字礼物将在母亲节及时到达
zh.summary: 母亲节即将到来（5月10日），流媒体订阅和数字礼卡为匆忙购物者提供了便利的礼物选择，提供体验而非实物，涵盖电影、电视、音乐和游戏访问。

title: Let it snow
summary: Snow creates powerful mood and atmosphere in video games, as demonstrated by recent releases Moomintroll: Winter's Warmth and Froggy Hates Snow, showcasing how the visual element enhances game design beyond technical graphical achievements.
content:
Water gets all the credit. When gaming companies want to show off new graphics technology, things tend to get wet; splashing waves that are only possible with the latest physics engine, or puddles that can reflect the world around them thanks to ray tracing. But there's something special about snow. It might not be as technically impressive as water, but when it comes to creating a mood in a game, snow can be very powerful. And two recent releases - Moomintroll: Winter's Warmth and Froggy Hates Snow - really capture just what snow is capable of.
Let's start with the Moomins. Winter's Warmth is the second game based on the iconic Finnish fai …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 冬雪纷飞
zh.summary: 雪在视频游戏中营造出强大的氛围和意境，如最近发布的《姆明：冬日温暖》和《青蛙讨厌雪》所示，展示了这一视觉元素如何增强游戏设计，超越技术图形成就。

title: The game that makes me actually want to exercise
summary: Pedometer++ 8.0 is a game that gamifies daily exercise, successfully motivating users to take more walks. The app merges entertainment mechanics with fitness tracking to make physical activity more engaging. This demonstrates how game design can serve as an effective tool for promoting healthy habits and wellness.
content:
Hi, friends! Welcome to Installer No. 127, your guide to the best and Verge-iest stuff in the world. (If you're new here, welcome, my Scorpion challenges your Sub-Zero to a duel, and also you can read all the old editions at the Installer homepage.) 
This week, I've been reading about Hasan Piker and lines and David Sacks and sleep learning, catching up on Andor (for me) and Young Jedi Adventures (for my toddler), poring over thousands of new Artemis II photos, listening to many hours of possibly the longest YouTube video ever, taking more walks thanks to Pedometer++ 8.0, losing my mind during every second of every Arsenal match, and spendi …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 让我真正想要运动的游戏
zh.summary: Pedometer++ 8.0是一款将日常锻炼游戏化的应用，成功激励用户增加散步次数。该应用将娱乐机制与健身追踪相结合，使体育运动更具吸引力。这表明游戏设计可以成为促进健康习惯和健康生活的有效工具。

title: Quantum dot TVs beat RGB LED TVs, says the company that makes QDs for TVs
summary: Quantum-dot TVs continue to offer superior image quality compared to RGB LED panels, according to manufacturer Nanosys's demonstration at Display Week 2026. While RGB LED dominates as the year's hottest TV trend, the side-by-side comparison revealed potential limitations of RGB LED backlights versus super quantum dot technology. The findings suggest quantum-dot TVs remain a compelling alternative despite RGB LED's market momentum.
content:
RGB LED technology might be everyone’s focus for TV tech in 2026, but quantum-dot TVs still might be the better choice. | Photo by John Higgins / The Verge	

At the Los Angeles Convention Center, two 85-inch TVs sat side by side inside the Nanosys meeting room at Display Week - a yearly business-to-business convention focusing on the technology that goes into displays of all types. One TV was a mini-LED panel with super quantum dots, and the other was an RGB LED - this year's hottest TV trend. Both TVs were showing the same content at the same time to highlight the differences between the two technologies - or more specifically, to show the potential failings of RGB LED backlights when compared to super quantum dot (SQD), which uses blue LEDs for the backlight.
I should probably mention that Nan …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 量子点电视击败RGB LED电视，量子点制造商表示
zh.summary: 根据量子点制造商Nanosys在2026年显示周的演示，量子点电视相比RGB LED面板仍然提供更优越的图像质量。尽管RGB LED作为今年最热门的电视趋势主导市场，但并排比较揭示了RGB LED背光相比超级量子点技术的潜在局限。研究结果表明，尽管RGB LED具有市场势头，量子点电视仍然是一个有竞争力的替代方案。

title: The new Wild West of AI kids’ toys
summary: Connected AI-powered toys are emerging as a disruptive force in children's entertainment, offering personalized experiences through smart companions. However, their rapid growth has raised regulatory concerns among lawmakers about their impact on play, child development, and family dynamics.
content: These connected companions could disrupt everything from make-believe to bedtime stories. No wonder some lawmakers want them banned.

zh.title: 人工智能儿童玩具的新蛮荒时代
zh.summary: 联网的人工智能动力玩具正在成为儿童娱乐领域的破坏性力量，通过智能伴侣提供个性化体验。然而，其快速增长引起了立法者的监管担忧，涉及其对游戏、儿童发展和家庭动态的影响。
